description_long: This object is a compact, double-action revolver with a matte black frame and a short, stainless steel cylinder. The grip is ergonomically contoured, made of a textured black material, and features a subtle logo on its side. The barrel is short and robust, with a red front sight for quick target acquisition and a smooth, rounded profile. The trigger guard is rounded and thick, providing ample space for finger placement and added safety. The revolver's frame displays a stylized atomic symbol, and the cylinder has a brushed metallic finish with visible chambers. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, suitable for concealed carry or personal defense in urban environments.
description: A compact, modern black revolver with a short stainless steel cylinder, ergonomic textured grip, and red front sight. Features include a rounded trigger guard and a stylized atomic logo on the frame.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the contoured black grip, atomic logo on the frame, and the brushed stainless steel cylinder.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, red front sight, and the rounded profile of the muzzle.
description_view_2: Right side view displaying the grip's ergonomic shape, the cylinder release, and the smooth lines of the frame.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the backstrap of the grip and the alignment of the sights along the top of the frame.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is compact and ergonomically contoured, constructed from a matte black material with a slightly textured, grippy surface. It features gentle finger grooves for improved handling and a subtle logo embossed on the upper portion. The backstrap is smoothly curved, and the overall shape is designed to fit comfortably in the hand, with no aggressive checkering or stippling but a consistent, tactile finish.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is robust and rounded, with a thick profile that provides ample space for finger placement. It has a smooth, continuous curve with no undercuts or squared-off edges, and lacks any visible texturing or reinforcement. The design is utilitarian, prioritizing safety and comfort.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and has a smooth, rounded profile with no visible threading, porting, or compensator features. It is finished in matte black, matching the frame, and features a red front sight for enhanced visibility. The exterior is unadorned except for the sight and a subtle model marking.
attribute_slide_markings: Visible markings include a stylized atomic symbol engraved on the left side of the frame and a faint model designation near the barrel. The markings are subtle, with the atomic logo being the most prominent decorative element.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: As a revolver, this object does not have a traditional magazine base or floorplate. The grip base is rounded and flush with the grip, lacking any extensions, flares, or finger rests, and is finished in the same matte black material as the rest of the grip.
